summary: Tested Videocorso update-course feature. Backend: 9/9 tests passed - POST /api/partner-journey/videocorso/update-course works correctly for adding/removing modules and lessons. Frontend: Partial - The 'Modifica struttura' button (data-testid='edit-structure-btn') is NOT visible in admin view because it's only rendered when isAdmin=false. The button should be visible to partners when course is approved.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Modifica struttura' button (data-testid='edit-structure-btn') not visible in admin view. Button only renders when !isAdmin && isCompleted && !isEditing. When admin views via 'Vista Partner', isAdmin=true is passed.
ui_bugs.note: This is by design - the button is for partner view only. Admin sees admin-panoramic-videocorso view instead.

action_items: VERIFY: Test the 'Modifica struttura' button by logging in as a partner user (not admin) to confirm it appears in partner view
OPTIONAL: Consider adding the edit functionality to admin view as well, or document that this feature is partner-only
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoint POST /api/partner-journey/videocorso/update-course is correctly implemented (lines 1092-1113 in partner_journey.py)
Frontend VideocorsoPage.jsx correctly implements the edit-structure-btn at line 361-366, but only in partner view (!isAdmin)
The isAdmin prop is passed as true when admin views via 'Vista Partner' tab (App.js lines 1764-1767)
Course data for partner 2 has 4 modules and course_approved=true

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Admin view tested, partner view requires partner login

test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74. Partner demo: testf0@evolutionpro.it (no password available)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend update-course endpoint works. Frontend 'Modifica struttura' button only appears in partner view (isAdmin=false). To fully test frontend, need to login as a partner user. The admin view shows admin-panoramic-videocorso with course-output-view and completed-banner, but no edit-structure-btn. Partner 2 has course_approved=true with 4 modules.
